intro.title: Welcome to Physical AI
intro.description: Learn about robotics, ROS 2, and the foundations of Physical AI

module-01-robotic-nervous-system/nodes-t.title: Chapter 2 - Nodes, Topics, Services
module-01-robotic-nervous-system/nodes-t.description: Master the fundamental communication patterns in ROS 2 - nodes, topics, and services

module-01-robotic-nervous-system/python-.title: Chapter 3 - Python-to-ROS Bridging via rclpy
module-01-robotic-nervous-system/python-.description: Master Python robotics development with rclpy - the ROS 2 Python client library

module-01-robotic-nervous-system/ros-mid.title: Chapter 1 - ROS 2 Middleware
module-01-robotic-nervous-system/ros-mid.description: Understanding the Robot Operating System 2 middleware architecture and communication infrastructure

module-01-robotic-nervous-system/urdf-hu.title: Chapter 4 - URDF for Humanoids
module-01-robotic-nervous-system/urdf-hu.description: Learn to define humanoid robot structures using URDF - the Unified Robot Description Format

module-02-digital-twin/building-environm.title: Chapter 2: Building Simulation Environments
module-02-digital-twin/building-environm.description: Learn to create custom Gazebo worlds, spawn models, configure lighting, and design realistic testing environments for robotics.

module-02-digital-twin/gazebo-physics-si.title: Chapter 1: Simulating Physics, Gravity, and Collisions in Gazebo
module-02-digital-twin/gazebo-physics-si.description: Learn how Gazebo simulates physics, configure gravity and friction, and implement collision detection for robotic systems.

module-02-digital-twin/module-02-digital.title: Module 2: The Digital Twin (Gazebo & Unity)
module-02-digital-twin/module-02-digital.description: Learn physics simulation, environment building, and sensor modeling for robotics using Gazebo and Unity.

module-02-digital-twin/sensor-simulation.title: Chapter 4: Simulating Sensors - LiDAR, Depth Cameras, and IMUs
module-02-digital-twin/sensor-simulation.description: Master sensor simulation for perception systems: configure LiDAR, depth cameras, and IMUs with ROS integration and visualization.

module-02-digital-twin/unity-rendering-i.title: Chapter 3: High-Fidelity Rendering and Human-Robot Interaction in Unity
module-02-digital-twin/unity-rendering-i.description: Learn Unity-ROS integration, photorealistic rendering pipelines, and human-robot interaction patterns for immersive digital twins.

module-03-ai-robot-brain/isaac-ros-perce.title: Chapter 2: Isaac ROS Hardware-Accelerated Perception
module-03-ai-robot-brain/isaac-ros-perce.description: Deploy GPU-accelerated perception pipelines using Isaac ROS GEMs for real-time sensor processing and AI inference.

module-03-ai-robot-brain/isaac-sim-synth.title: Chapter 1: NVIDIA Isaac Sim and Synthetic Data Generation
module-03-ai-robot-brain/isaac-sim-synth.description: Learn to create photorealistic simulations and generate synthetic training data using NVIDIA Isaac Sim and Omniverse.

module-03-ai-robot-brain/module-03-ai-ro.title: Module 3: The AI-Robot Brain (NVIDIA Isaac™)
module-03-ai-robot-brain/module-03-ai-ro.description: Master advanced perception and training for humanoid robots using NVIDIA Isaac Sim, Isaac ROS, and Nav2 for intelligent navigation and decision-making.

module-03-ai-robot-brain/nav2-bipedal-pl.title: Chapter 4: Nav2 Path Planning for Bipedal Movement
module-03-ai-robot-brain/nav2-bipedal-pl.description: Configure the ROS 2 Navigation Stack (Nav2) for humanoid robots with bipedal motion constraints, footstep planning, and stability considerations.

module-03-ai-robot-brain/visual-slam-nav.title: Chapter 3: Visual SLAM for Humanoid Navigation
module-03-ai-robot-brain/visual-slam-nav.description: Master Visual SLAM techniques to enable real-time localization and mapping for humanoid robots using Isaac ROS and CUDA acceleration.

module-04-vision-language-action/capston.title: Chapter 4: Capstone - The Autonomous Humanoid
module-04-vision-language-action/capston.description: Build a complete autonomous humanoid robot integrating voice commands, LLM planning, computer vision, navigation, and manipulation in Isaac Sim. Your portfolio-worthy VLA capstone.

module-04-vision-language-action/chapter.title: chapter1-completion
module-04-vision-language-action/chapter.description: Human: "Pick up the red box from shelf C7"

module-04-vision-language-action/cogniti.title: Chapter 2: Cognitive Planning with LLMs
module-04-vision-language-action/cogniti.description: Learn how to use Large Language Models for robot task planning, decompose natural language commands into executable action sequences, engineer prompts for robotics safety, and build adaptive replanning systems.

module-04-vision-language-action/compute.title: Chapter 3: Computer Vision for Object Recognition
module-04-vision-language-action/compute.description: Master vision foundation models (CLIP, SAM, Grounding DINO) for robot perception, implement object detection and 6D pose estimation, and build vision-to-grasp pipelines that ground language in visual reality.

module-04-vision-language-action/module-.title: Module 4: Vision-Language-Action (VLA)
module-04-vision-language-action/module-.description: The convergence of LLMs and robotics. Learn voice-to-action with Whisper, cognitive planning with LLMs, computer vision for object recognition, and complete an autonomous humanoid capstone project.

module-04-vision-language-action/voice-t.title: Chapter 1: Voice-to-Action with OpenAI Whisper
module-04-vision-language-action/voice-t.description: Learn how to enable robots to understand human voice commands using OpenAI Whisper, integrate speech-to-text with ROS 2, and build complete voice-to-action pipelines for natural human-robot interaction.
